refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns TRUE if the bbox of this geometry is cached, FALSE otherwise.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns TRUE if the bbox of this geometry is cached, FALSE otherwise. Use and to control caching.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting: SELECT geom FROM sometable WHERE PostGIS_HasBBox(geom) = false;
